headline: 5 of Bank of America’s US1 List Top Picks Also Pay Big Passive Income
summary: Most dividend investors seek solid passive income streams from quality dividend stocks. Passive income is a steady stream of unearned income that doesn’t require active traditional work. Shared ideas for earning passive income include investments such as dividend stocks, bonds, and mutual funds, as well as real estate and additional income-producing side hustles. These days, ... 5 of Bank of America’s US1 List Top Picks Also Pay Big Passive Income

headline: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Public Service Enterprise to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $96
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   upgrades Public Service Enterprise (NYSE:PEG) from In-Line to Outperform and raises the price target from $83 to $96.
